game/saves/
**/saves/

# Bytecode / cache
**/__pycache__/
*.pyc
*.pyo
*.pyd
*.rpyb
*.rpyc
*.rpymc

# Logs / crash files
log.txt
errors.txt
traceback.txt

# Build / distribution output
dist/
build/
rapt/
android/

# OS files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Editor / IDE
.vscode/
.idea/

# Temporary files
*.swp
*.tmp
*~
